parameters.formDescription: Upps! El sistema de impresiones está pausado. Para reactivarlo o seguir usándolo, accede a www.toqueflow.com

values.placeholder: Pega aquí el texto del pedido Rappi...

options.customCss: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap'); * { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif !important; box-sizing: border-box !important; } body { background: radial-gradient(ellipse at top, #1a1f2e 0%, #0a0a0f 50%, #000 100%) !important; min-height: 100vh !important; padding: 20px 16px 0 !important; position: relative !important; } body::before { content: '' !important; position: fixed !important; top: 0 !important; left: 0 !important; right: 0 !important; bottom: 0 !important; background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 80%, rgba(255, 184, 0, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, rgba(255, 140, 0, 0.06) 0%, transparent 50%) !important; pointer-events: none !important; z-index: 0 !important; } .card { background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(35, 35, 45, 0.85), rgba(15, 15, 22, 0.95)) !important; border-radius: 24px !important; padding: 28px 32px !important; max-width: 760px !important; margin: 0 auto !important; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 184, 0, 0.15) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(20px) !important; -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) !important; box-shadow: 0 0 80px rgba(255, 184, 0, 0.08), 0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) !important; position: relative !important; overflow: hidden !important; z-index: 1 !important; } .card::before { content: '' !important; position: absolute !important; top: 0 !important; left: 0 !important; right: 0 !important; height: 2px !important; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #ffb800 30%, #ff8c00 50%, #ffb800 70%, transparent) !important; } h1, [class*='formTitle'], [class*='title'] { color: #fff !important; font-size: 28px !important; font-weight: 800 !important; text-align: center !important; letter-spacing: 3px !important; text-transform: uppercase !important; margin-bottom: 12px !important; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 0%, #ffb800 100%) !important; -webkit-background-clip: text !important; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent !important; background-clip: text !important; } .card { background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,'), linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(35, 35, 45, 0.85), rgba(15, 15, 22, 0.95)) !important; background-repeat: no-repeat, no-repeat !important; background-position: center 24px, center !important; background-size: auto 40px, cover !important; padding-top: 84px !important; } p, [class*='description'] { color: #888 !important; text-align: center !important; font-size: 11px !important; font-weight: 500 !important; letter-spacing: 2px !important; text-transform: uppercase !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; } label, [class*='label'] { display: none !important; } input[type='text'], textarea { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4) !important; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 184, 0, 0.2) !important; border-radius: 12px !important; padding: 18px !important; font-size: 14px !important; color: #fff !important; width: 100% !important; transition: all 0.3s !important; box-shadow: inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) !important; } textarea { min-height: max(260px, calc(100vh - 720px)) !important; max-height: 480px !important; resize: vertical !important; line-height: 1.6 !important; font-weight: 400 !important; } input[type='text']::placeholder, textarea::placeholder { color: #555 !important; font-weight: 400 !important; } input[type='text']:focus, textarea:focus { outline: none !important; border-color: #ffb800 !important; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6) !important; box-shadow: inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3), 0 0 0 4px rgba(255, 184, 0, 0.15), 0 0 30px rgba(255, 184, 0, 0.2) !important; } .form-group, [class*='form-group'], [class*='formGroup'], [class*='field'] { margin-bottom: 0 !important; padding-bottom: 0 !important; } button[type='submit'], .btn, .btn-primary, [class*='submit'] button, [class*='Button'] { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffb800 0%, #ff8c00 100%) !important; color: #0a0a0f !important; font-size: 14px !important; font-weight: 800 !important; border-radius: 12px !important; padding: 18px 20px !important; text-transform: uppercase !important; letter-spacing: 3px !important; border: none !important; cursor: pointer !important; width: 100% !important; margin-top: 12px !important; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) !important; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(255, 184, 0, 0.35), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) !important; position: relative !important; overflow: hidden !important; } button[type='submit']::after, .btn::after { content: '' !important; position: absolute !important; top: 0 !important; left: -75% !important; width: 50% !important; height: 100% !important; background: linear-gradient(120deg, transparent 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.55) 50%, transparent 100%) !important; transform: skewX(-25deg) !important; transition: left 0.7s ease !important; pointer-events: none !important; z-index: 1 !important; } button[type='submit']:hover, .btn:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffd24d 0%, #ffa31f 100%) !important; transform: translateY(-1px) !important; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(255, 184, 0, 0.18), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) !important; } button[type='submit']:hover::after, .btn:hover::after { left: 125% !important; } button[type='submit']:active, .btn:active { transform: translateY(0) !important; } .required-asterisk, .required, [class*='required'] { color: #ff8c00 !important; } footer, .form-footer, [class*='footer'], [class*='powered'], [class*='n8n-branding'], [class*='branding'], .n8n-link, hr, #submitted-form, a[href*='n8n.io'] { display: none !important; visibility: hidden !important; height: 0 !important; overflow: hidden !important; margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; } .container, section { padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 auto !important; max-width: 760px !important; } body > div > div:last-child { display: none !important; } .form-group, .form-input, textarea, [class*='form-group'] { display: none !important; } h1 { font-size: 32px !important; } p, [class*='description'] { font-size: 14px !important; line-height: 1.6 !important; margin-bottom: 28px !important; } form, [class*='form-wrapper'], [class*='formWrapper'], main, #app, #app > div, [class*='content'], [class*='Content'] { padding-top: 0 !important; padding-bottom: 0 !important; margin-top: 0 !important; margin-bottom: 0 !important; align-items: flex-start !important; justify-content: flex-start !important; min-height: 0 !important; } .tf-credit { display: block !important; text-align: center !important; margin: 28px auto 0 !important; color: #555 !important; font-size: 9px !important; font-weight: 600 !important; letter-spacing: 3px !important; text-transform: uppercase !important; opacity: 0.7 !important; position: relative !important; z-index: 2 !important; } .tf-credit img { display: block !important; margin: 6px auto 0 !important; height: 18px !important; width: auto !important; opacity: 0.85 !important; } body::after { content: 'HECHO POR' !important; display: block !important; text-align: center !important; margin: 16px auto 0 !important; color: #888 !important; font-size: 11px !important; font-weight: 600 !important; letter-spacing: 3px !important; text-transform: uppercase !important; padding-top: 4px !important; padding-bottom: 92px !important; background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,') !important; background-repeat: no-repeat !important; background-position: center bottom !important; background-size: auto 88px !important; opacity: 0.8 !important; position: relative !important; z-index: 2 !important; }
